perks.summary: substring-search PrimeKG nodes by name, optionally filtered by node type (read-only)
list direct neighbors of a PrimeKG node, optionally filtered by relation type (read-only)
find direct (depth-1) edges connecting two PrimeKG nodes, e.g. drug-disease (read-only)
summarize the local graph around a disease: associated genes, drugs, phenotypes, related diseases (read-only)
